verdict: Coppertone Sport delivers exceptional value with a straightforward, effective chemical filter blend and hydrating glycerin base. The high review count (2156) and 4.4★ rating indicate reliable, accessible sun protection without luxury pretension.

_research.name: Coppertone Sport Sunscreen Lotion SPF 50
_research.con: Generic ingredient profile lacks antioxidants or skin-conditioning actives found in premium lines.
